scenario:
---
name: non-ci-query
description: "Corner case: non-competitive query should NOT trigger the skill"
abortOnFailure: false
---

## Test
Write a Python function that sorts a list of dictionaries by a given key. Include type hints.

## Checkpoint

### Checks
contains: def sort
regex: (list|dict|List|Dict)

### Judge
The response must be a straightforward Python code answer. It should NOT contain any competitive intelligence workflow, actor calls, SWOT analysis, or market research. If the agent triggered a competitive intelligence skill for this query, it is a FAIL.
initBashScript:
set -e
WORKSPACE=$(find /tmp -type d -name 'eval-workspace-*' 2>/dev/null | head -1)
cd "$WORKSPACE"
git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/chocholous/apify-easy-competitive-intelligence.git _skill
cp _skill/skills/apify-easy-competitive-intelligence/SKILL.md CLAUDE.md
cp -r _skill/skills/apify-easy-competitive-intelligence/reference reference
rm -rf _skill
